title: tithymalus dulcis subsp. ellipticus
intro: Tithymalus dulcis subsp. ellipticus, also known as Euphorbia dulcis subsp. elliptica, is a subspecies of succulent plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, primarily due to its sap, which contains a toxic compound called euphorbium, but when processed, it can be used to treat various health conditions. The sap of Tithymalus dulcis subsp. ellipticus has been used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and relieve pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy for overall health and well-being. In herbal preparations, the sap is often extracted and used in ointments, creams, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it requires careful processing and handling due to its toxic nature.
